design: Each frozen triplet contains an anchor, a physically equivalent paraphrase with different wording and converted units, and a near-verbatim numerical reversal with the opposite physical answer.

families.family_name: Crack size and critical fracture stress

prompts.stem: A conventional polycrystalline wrought nickel-based superalloy changes from 80-micrometer to 20-micrometer equiaxed grains while composition, texture, precipitates, porosity, and dislocation density are held fixed. Relative to the initial microstructure, what happens to yield strength?
prompts.user: A conventional polycrystalline wrought nickel-based superalloy changes from 80-micrometer to 20-micrometer equiaxed grains while composition, texture, precipitates, porosity, and dislocation density are held fixed. Relative to the initial microstructure, what happens to yield strength? Answer exactly one lowercase word from this ordered pair: higher, lower.

prompts.stem: In the same wrought nickel-based superalloy, no microstructural variable changes except mean crystallite diameter. It contracts from 0.08 millimeters to 0.02 millimeters. The alloy remains in the conventional Hall-Petch regime. Select the resulting trend in flow strength.
prompts.user: In the same wrought nickel-based superalloy, no microstructural variable changes except mean crystallite diameter. It contracts from 0.08 millimeters to 0.02 millimeters. prompts.stem: A unidirectional silicon-carbide-fiber titanium composite changes from 10 percent to 40 percent aligned fiber volume fraction while fiber orientation, constituent moduli, porosity, and interface quality remain fixed. What happens to the longitudinal elastic modulus?
prompts.user: A unidirectional silicon-carbide-fiber titanium composite changes from 10 percent to 40 percent aligned fiber volume fraction while fiber orientation, constituent moduli, porosity, and interface quality remain fixed. What happens to the longitudinal elastic modulus? Answer exactly one lowercase word from this ordered pair: smaller, greater.

prompts.stem: A medium-carbon steel microstructure changes from 20 percent to 80 percent martensite, with the balance ferrite, while carbon content, prior-austenite grain size, tempering state, and residual stress remain fixed. What happens to bulk hardness?
prompts.user: A medium-carbon steel microstructure changes from 20 percent to 80 percent martensite, with the balance ferrite, while carbon content, prior-austenite grain size, tempering state, and residual stress remain fixed. What happens to bulk hardness? Answer exactly one lowercase word from this ordered pair: higher, lower.
